takeaway: The 2007 POSet contains 25 countries, 25 unique profiles, and an incomparability ratio of 0.68.
The 2019 POSet contains 35 countries, 34 unique profiles, and an incomparability ratio of 0.77.
Frontier countries outperform non-frontier countries on 5/6 available macro validation metrics.
Frontier countries outperform non-frontier countries on 5/6 available macro validation metrics.
Frontier countries recover faster on average by approximately 0.82 years relative to non-frontier countries.
Frontier countries recover faster on average by approximately 0.26 years relative to non-frontier countries.
The project should not be presented as a single universal Economic Resilience Index.
The POSet uses two shock-specific pre-shock cross-sections rather than a 22-year average profile.
Validation results are descriptive and should not be interpreted as causal evidence.
